title: At The "Cock" Tavern.
content:
Champagne doth not a luncheon make,
         Nor caviare a meal;
    Men gluttonous and rich may take
         These till they make them ill.
    If I've potatoes to my chop,
         And after that have cheese,
    Angels in Pond & Spiers's shop
         Serve no such luxuries.
meaning:
Horace Smith's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "At The "Cock" Tavern."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
